#+JETPACS_APP: crm
#+TITLE: People CRM
#+JETPACS_ICON: contacts

* People
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: records
:SOURCE: people.org::*Contacts
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Name) %todo(Status) %Phone %Tier %DEADLINE(Renewal)
:COLTYPES: text text text text date
:END:

* Gold
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: records
:SOURCE: people.org::*Contacts
:SCHEMA: %ITEM(Name) %Phone
:FILTER: Tier="Gold"
:END:

* Scratch
:PROPERTIES:
:KIND: records
:SCHEMA: %ITEM %Note
:END:

** First scratch record
:PROPERTIES:
:Note: inline records live right here in the app doc
:END:
